steps.html: From building platforms to fight cancer with machine learning & big data...
...to teaching game design, coding, and robotics across the socioeconomic spectrum...
...to analysing hydrologic & ecosystemic implications of Central Valley agriculture;

intro.summary: I've had amazing opportunities to work at empowering companies, non-profits & innovative research labs!

items.NAME: 🪟 Microsoft
items.TITLE: Senior SWE, SWE I & II, SWE Intern
items.MOTTO: Empowering every person & every organization on the planet to achieve more
items.TEXT:
• Brought Azure Machine Learning Online Endpoints' data plane to general availability, now serving 8 billion real-time inferencing requests per day.
  • Volunteering as DRI Champ to spearhead engineering process improvements.
  • Deployed microservices across 30 regions on Azure Virtual Machine Scale Sets and set up telemetry flows in Azure Data Explorer and dashboards in PowerBI.
  • Created Envoy Proxy build pipeline with Bazel, and implemented C++ filters:
    • SHA-256 key-based authentication filter with CORS preflight support.
    • Azure Active Directory authentication filter with LRU decision cache.
    • Global rate limit access control filter with Go microservice, Redis cache.
  • Designed and built an agentless Jupyter notebook validation pipeline with Azure DevOps Pipelines, Azure ML SDK and Azure Functions to improve runner CI. Azure MLOps →

items.NAME: 🧬 Ventana
items.TITLE: SWE Intern
items.MOTTO: Improving the quality of life for all patients afflicted with cancer
items.TEXT:
• Pushed feature-adds and bug-fixes for MEAN stack digital pathology web app.
  • Prototyped OpenSeaDragon-esque image and annotation renderer in Pixi.Js.
  • Modernized Nagios server monitoring with Icinga, Graphite and Grafana.

items.NAME: 🛰️ VICE Lab
items.TITLE: Geospatial RA
items.MOTTO: Focusing on pressing environmental problems facing California & the planet
items.TEXT:
• Led team to develop heuristic and ML scripts in Google Earth Engine to model and predict California's agricultural fallowing using observation satellite data.
  • Onboarded lab to GitHub and open-sourced scripts written in Python, C# and R.
  • Refurbished lab's website, now hosting on GitHub Pages: vicelab.net.

items.NAME: 🏭 ANDES Lab
items.TITLE: Computational RA
items.MOTTO: Providing solutions to grand challenge problems around building & deploying usable systems
items.TEXT: • Visualized InfluxDB data for HVAC predictive control system in Python, Grafana.

items.NAME: 🚀 MACES
items.TITLE: Computational RA
items.MOTTO: Innovating functional materials & future scientists to drive NASA missions & the globe
items.TEXT: • Worked on Firmi to 3D-print Fermi surfaces via Marching cubes in Fortran90.

items.NAME: 🏙️ CITRIS & Banatao Institute
items.TITLE: Event Organizer, Web Developer
items.MOTTO: Creating information technology solutions for society's most pressing challenges
items.TEXT: • Developed GitOps content management system via jQuery and CSV files to replace Drupal stack, now hosting on GitHub Pages: citris.ucmerced.edu.

items.NAME: 🧑‍💻 HackMerced
items.TITLE: Director
items.MOTTO: Bringing technological innovation to the heart of the San Joaquin Valley since 2016
items.TEXT: • Hosted MLH hackathon for 300 students, fundraising $20,000 from sponsors!

items.NAME: 🌱 LearnBEAT
items.TITLE: Instructor
items.MOTTO: Increasing scientific literacy in the Central Valley through project-based learning
items.TEXT: • Taught hands-on STEM workshops to underserved K–12 students in the Central Valley, increasing scientific literacy through interactive experiments and project-based learning.

items.NAME: 🤝 ACM
items.TITLE: Outreach Lead
items.MOTTO: Advancing computing as a science & profession
items.TEXT: • Organized outreach events and coding workshops to promote computing as a science and profession.

items.NAME: 🧑‍🏫 Alamo Robotics
items.TITLE: Volunteer
items.MOTTO: Using Lego Mindstorm as a platform to teach the next generation of engineers
items.TEXT: • Mentored young students in programming and building robots with Lego Mindstorm, fostering problem-solving and engineering skills in the next generation.

items.NAME: 🧑‍🏫 Summer of Game Design
items.TITLE: Instructor, Founder
items.MOTTO: Using game design as an engaging medium to teach computer science
items.TEXT:
• Co-founded non-profit game programming summer camp, fundraising $25,000!
  • Created SpaceNinjas, a boilerplate 2D platformer used as a teaching aid.

items.NAME: 🤖 Red Tie Robotics
items.TITLE: Treasurer, Electrical Lead, Electrician
items.MOTTO: Inspiring STEM excellence in Danville & communities across the world
items.TEXT:
• Managed a team of four to design and implement systems to align with mechanical and programming teams' specifications.
  • Designed, modeled (AutoCAD) and integrated robotic electrical systems including a power distribution system, motor controllers, sensors, and central microprocessors under tight spatial and weight constraints.
  • Responsible for soldering, crimping, and general assembly of electrical systems, emphasizing quality of work to assure high reliability during competitions.
  • Contracted by AMAX to design and integrate circuitry to provide a haptic and visual feedback security measure for engineers assembling server components.
  • Fundraised, managed and allocated spending of $18,000 to fund each year's build season.
